## Meeting Purpose

[Final interview with Robert Teahan for Managing Editor role at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves managing editor, client relations, and team management responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Company culture emphasizes extreme ownership, intellectual curiosity, and excellence](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Robert's background in translation and technical editing aligns well with the position](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Potential gap identified in Robert's content strategy experience](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [fwd.digital is growing rapidly, with 15 current team members and plans to hire 3-5 more](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Company Growth

  - [fwd.digital has 21 clients, including Reddit and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Company grew from 0 to $2M annual recurring revenue in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Hiring 3-5 people for upleveled Managing Editor role](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Role involves leading strategy, managing teams, and potential workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Goal: enable Managing Editors to fully own client engagements over time](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

### Remote Work and Company Culture

  - [Global talent pool with good English skills prioritized](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Culture focuses on extreme ownership, intellectual curiosity, and excellence](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Emphasis on challenging each other and clients to improve](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Aim to scale from 20 to 100+ clients efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

### Robert's Background and Skills

  - [Current role: Freelance Technical Editor at Mindrift](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Experience in translation, technical writing, and editing](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Interested in expanding skills, particularly in AI and emerging markets](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Adapts well to new environments and roles](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Self-described as level-headed and able to manage stress effectively](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### Content Strategy and Technical Understanding

  - [Marcel identified potential gap in Robert's content strategy experience](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Robert's approach to new clients:](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
    1.  Research the market and competitors
    2.  Understand the client's specific offerings and goals
    3.  Consult with team members and subject matter experts
    4.  Identify challenging concepts to explain in content
    5.  Analyze existing content and public profile to find gaps

### Team Structure and Communication

  - [Current team size: 15 full-time, \~20 freelancers/fractional](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Primary communication tools: Slack and Notion](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [All meetings recorded and transcribed](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Each client has dedicated Slack channels (internal and external)](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital team to regroup and make final hiring decisions](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Follow-up with candidates expected by Tuesday of the following week](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Robert to consider any additional questions or information to provide](https://fathom.video/share/g15sH3ZzvsqenwbpWHVq6wVT-hqZyMS2?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
